item.title: Budget Battles and Fiscal Fumbles
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Budget Battles and Fiscal Fumbles

In Congress, a budget was slain,
As Trump’s foreign aid cuts took the main.
NPR’s in retreat,
PBS faced defeat,
While interest rates cause financial strain.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Senate Approves Trump’s Bid to Cancel Foreign Aid and Funds for NPR and PBS Stations
  • Trump Wants Lower Rates. Firing Powell Could Push Them Higher.

item.title: The Trump-Musk Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Trump-Musk Tango

In politics, a battle’s begun,
Between Trump and Musk, neither one has won.
From contracts to tweets,
Each trades fiery heats,
While the deficit grows under the sun.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump and Musk Trade Threats, From Broaching Impeachment to Cutting Contracts
  • 8 Ways Elon Musk and Trump Could Inflict Pain on Each Other
  • Deficit Politics Returns in Debate Over Trump Tax Cuts

item.title: Regrets and Rifts: The Costly Bill
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Regrets and Rifts: The Costly Bill

A bill passed with whispers and fears,
Now some GOP members shed tears.
Musk tweeted disdain,
Saying ‘What a shame!’
As power costs soar for the years.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Some House Republicans Have Regrets After Passing Trump’s Domestic Policy Bill
  • Elon Musk Calls Trump Policy Bill a ‘Disgusting Abomination’
  • Electricity Prices Are Surging. The G.O.P. Megabill Could Push Them Higher.

item.title: A Bill's Nighttime Odyssey
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A Bill’s Nighttime Odyssey

The G.O.P. worked through the night,
To pass a bill they called a delight.
But rebels like Roy,
Saw spending as ploy,
While bond markets trembled in fright.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • House G.O.P. Races to Revamp Major Policy Bill, Grasping for Votes to Pass It
  • Why Trump’s ‘Big, Beautiful’ Tax Bill Is Worrying Bond Investors
  • Chip Roy, Demanding More Spending Cuts, Reprises Role as Ringleader of G.O.P. Rebels

item.title: Cuts, Campaigns, and Connections
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Cuts, Campaigns, and Connections

Elon and Trump in a race,
Cutting budgets at a brisk pace.
With Musk in Wisconsin,
GOP hopes glisten,
As Vought trims ‘woke’ with grace.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Forgoing Oversight, Republicans Resort to Personal Appeals to Head Off DOGE Cuts
  • Elon Musk to Campaign in Wisconsin Ahead of Supreme Court Election
  • Russell Vought, Trump’s Budget Chief, Wants to Cut ‘Woke’ Spending

item.title: Capitol Conflicts and Comebacks
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Capitol Conflicts and Comebacks

In Washington, Trump makes a plea,
To tame the Justice Dept’s spree.
While Schumer’s Senate fights,
To keep funds flowing right,
And CFPB’s back with glee.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • In Speech to Justice Dept., Trump Airs Grievances Against His Enemies
  • The Senate votes to avert a shutdown after Schumer relents.
  • Left for Dead, the C.F.P.B. Inches Back to Life

item.title: The Power Shift Shuffle
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Power Shift Shuffle

Congress once held the reins tight,
But with Trump’s power, they’ve taken flight.
Earmarks were lost,
At democracy’s cost,
Now stocks tumble in economic plight.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Under G.O.P., Congress Cedes Power to Trump, Eroding Its Influence
  • As Congress Weighs a Spending Bill, Earmarks Are a Casualty
  • The Russell 2000 Index Is Flashing Economic Warning Signs

item.title: Budget Battles and the Medicaid Quandary
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Budget Battles and the Medicaid Quandary

The House passed a budget with flair,
With cuts that will make many stare.
Medicaid’s on the block,
But what can they dock,
When there’s not much left to spare?

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • House Passes G.O.P. Budget Teeing Up Enormous Tax and Spending Cuts
  • What Can House Republicans Cut Instead of Medicaid? Not Much.

item.title: Shutdown Showdown
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Shutdown Showdown

In Congress, a shutdown looms large,
With Trump and Musk both taking charge.
The workers despair,
While flights are a scare—
The government can’t seem to barge!

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Here’s What Could Happen in a Government Shutdown
  • The Shutdown Crisis Leads to Questions About Who Is in Charge
  • What a Shutdown Could Look Like, and a ‘Healthy’ Food Fight

item.title: A Spending Deal Decline
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A Spending Deal Decline

There once was a deal on the line,
‘Til Trump said, “It’s not worth a dime!”
With Musk egging on,
The compromise was gone,
Now shutdown fears grow like a vine.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump, Egged On by Musk, Condemns Spending Deal, Raising Fears of Government Shutdown
  • Trump Pans Spending Deal With Government Shutdown Looming
  • Where Does a ‘Remarkable’ U.S. Economy Go From Here?
